context: Disco faded as new wave, synth-pop, and arena rock surged forward. Blondie's 'Call Me' epitomized new wave crossover, Pink Floyd delivered a prog-rock anthem, and Michael Jackson's 'Rock with You' hinted at the pop dominance to come.

tracks.title: Another Brick in the Wall, Part II
Do That to Me One More Time
It's Still Rock and Roll to Me
